data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of crediting the call fee toward a full booking. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented, as there is no direct API read or persisted state check that verifies the automatic crediting of the $40 call fee after booking a strategy session. The linked use case describes the intended behavior, but without concrete evidence of the implementation, this requirement remains unvalidated.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the option to credit the call fee toward a full booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
